description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to any branch. Use a matrix job that runs on both ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python versions 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8, excluding macos-latest with Python 3.8. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python with the matrix version, installs dependencies, lints with flake8, tests with pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov.
